metadata.title: Mestermind
metadata.description: Find trusted local professionals in Budapest.

services.title: Find the right pro
services.hint: Choose a service to see matching pros.

hero.body: Join 1,200+ professionals already using Mestermind to find clients, build their reputation, and grow their income across Budapest.

benefits.headline: Everything you need to win more jobs.
benefits.body: Built for independent professionals who want to spend more time working and less time finding work.

found.title: Get found by thousands
found.body: Mestermind connects you with customers actively searching for your services across all 23 Budapest districts.

schedule.title: You control your schedule
schedule.body: Accept only the jobs you want, when you want them. No pressure, no commitments you didn't agree to.

paid.title: Get paid fairly
paid.body: Set your own rates. Customers see your starting price upfront, so the people who contact you are already interested.

reputation.title: Build your reputation
reputation.body: Every completed job is an opportunity for a verified review. Great work compounds — your profile gets stronger over time.

steps.headline: Up and running in three steps.
steps.body: No complicated setup. No waiting for approval. Start receiving enquiries the same day.

profile.title: Create your profile
profile.body: Tell us about your services, experience, and pricing. Takes less than 10 minutes.

matched.title: Get matched with jobs
matched.body: We surface your profile to customers looking for exactly what you offer, in your district.

paid.title: Win the job. Get paid.
paid.body: Quote, confirm, and complete. Reviews build automatically after each job.

free.question: Is it free to join?
free.answer: Yes. Creating a profile and browsing job requests is completely free. We only charge a small fee when you win a job through the platform.

types.question: What types of professionals can join?
types.answer: Anyone offering a home or personal service — cleaners, handymen, electricians, plumbers, photographers, tutors, personal trainers, and more.

reviews.question: How do I get reviews?
reviews.answer: After every completed job, the customer receives an automatic prompt to leave a review. You don't need to ask — we handle it.

prices.question: Can I set my own prices?
prices.answer: Absolutely. You set a starting price that customers see on your profile, and you quote each job individually based on the details.

finalCta.headline: Ready to get started?
finalCta.body: Create your free profile today and start receiving job requests from customers across Budapest.

hero.searchPlaceholder: Describe your project or problem — be as detailed as you'd like!
hero.trustSuffix: with over 300k reviews on the App Store

why.body: Finding a reliable cleaner, handyman, or contractor in Budapest used to mean hours of calls and crossed fingers. Mestermind puts 1,200+ vetted professionals one search away.

fast.headline: From search to booked in minutes.
fast.body: No more scrolling through Facebook groups, chasing unresponsive numbers, or hoping for the best. Describe your project, pick your district, and get matched with available professionals immediately.

verified.headline: Every pro reviewed by real Budapest residents.
verified.body: Ratings come from verified customers — not bots, not the pros themselves. Read what your neighbours actually experienced before you commit to anyone.

prices.headline: See prices before you pick up the phone.
prices.body: Transparent starting prices on every listing. Request quotes from multiple pros, compare what you get, and choose the best fit. No surprises, no awkward conversations.

eszter.quote: Found an excellent house cleaner within minutes. The booking process was seamless and the job was done better than any agency I've used before.

bence.quote: Plumbing emergency on a Sunday. Mestermind connected me with someone who arrived within two hours. Saved my entire weekend.

reka.quote: We hired a photography team for our company event. Professional, punctual, and the results were exactly what we needed. Will use again.

categories.headline: 550+ services, one platform.
categories.body: From a leaking tap to a corporate event — we have a professional for it.

steps.headline: Up and running in three steps.
steps.body: No account required to browse. No commitment until you book.

describe.title: Describe your project
describe.body: Tell us what you need — be as specific as you like. The more detail you give, the better your matches.

match.title: Get matched instantly
match.body: We surface vetted, reviewed professionals available in your Budapest district right now.

book.title: Book with confidence
book.body: Compare prices and reviews side by side, then hire directly through the platform.

finalCta.headline: Budapest's home services, sorted.
finalCta.body: Join thousands of residents who find trusted professionals on Mestermind every day.
